strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 19 years of continuous technical progression across web, mobile, cloud, and AI infrastructure engineering
Demonstrates innovation capability through founding GISCollective (open-source platform in production with Green Map), plus multiple maintained technical libraries
Currently working at Staff level on AI infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq, showing active engagement with strategic technology areas
concerns: Limited evidence of building recognized AI products or platforms—most career has been traditional software engineering with only recent AI infrastructure involvement
No advanced degree in AI (preferred Master's/PhD); resume lacks demonstrated thought leadership or recognized expertise in AI field

No clear evidence of strategic customer advisory work or director-level organizational influence expected for this role; resume shows strong IC technical skills but limited visibility into broader strategic impact

key_factors.factor: Strong Technical Breadth and Innovation Track Record
Recent AI Work Lacks Product and Thought Leadership Impact

response.justification: Szabo brings substantial technical experience and innovation capability, meeting the 15-year requirement and demonstrating hands-on engineering excellence. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' While his current re:cinq role involves AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks, the resume lacks evidence of shipping major AI products or establishing thought leadership in AI strategy. His career pivot to AI is recent and appears infrastructure-focused rather than product-focused. He is technically strong but appears better positioned for a senior IC engineering role than a director-level AI strategy position requiring established AI expertise and customer advisory experience.
